params.name: Bejer Earphones
params.description:
On Apr 23, 1924 AD, Bejer invented his first headphone products.
During Bejer's lifetime, loudspeakers were mainly used in movie theaters and other venues. He tried to find a way to deliver sound directly to people's ears, which led him to study loudspeakers. Eventually, he created the first headphones by greatly reducing their size and adding a fixing set.
